channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Compiler diagnostics and Rust codegen ergonomics
item.description: Policy for miette vs custom diagnostics, error layers, and how contributors should read and troubleshoot vox check output.

item.title: VoxScript as Universal Glue Code — Research & Architecture 2026
item.description: Strategy, security model, execution tiers, and migration policy for replacing .ps1/.sh/.py glue scripts with .vox files driven by `vox run`.

item.title: Vox Language Focused Training SSOT
item.description: Vox Language Focused Training SSOT

item.title: Coding Agent Instructions
item.description: Quick-reference heuristics, TOESTUB rule table, and pre-commit checklist for AI coding agents operating on Vox.

item.title: The Vox Contribution Loop
item.description: How Vox contributions feed the MENS training pipeline, why quality gates matter doubly, and what makes code training-eligible.

item.title: TOESTUB contributor guide
item.description: Rule-by-rule troubleshooting for TOESTUB CI failures, with fix patterns, suppression guidance, and false-positive notes.

item.title: Contributing — Mens native training
item.description: Onboarding for vox-populi tensor, vox mens train paths, and the golden corpus flywheel.

item.title: Contributing — parser and HIR
item.description: Onboarding for vox-compiler frontend, HIR lowering, and diagnostic discipline.

item.title: Vox A2A Orchestration Hardening Findings 2026
item.description: Synthesized results and implementation details for securing agent-to-agent handoffs, preventing infinite loops, and ensuring durable context continuity.

item.title: Actor GC Implementation Blueprint
item.description: Detailed operational blueprint for bridging actor boundaries in the Vox Rust-lowering compiler to support Per-Actor Garbage Collection, isolating LLM code generation from strict borrow-checking.

item.title: CSS and AI Inference: The Computed Styles Cascade Problem
item.description: Research findings on the challenges AI agents face when inferring CSS computed styles, how CSS differs mechanically from traditional programming, and potential mitigations.

item.title: CSS Determinism: Implementation Plan for Vox Style Emission
item.description: Grounded implementation plan for making Vox's CSS emission auditable, constraint-checked, and AI-tractable. Rooted in actual codebase analysis of codegen_ts/emitter.rs, web_ir/, and the StyleBlock/StyleNode pipeline.

item.title: Custom Model Pretraining vs Qwen Fine-Tuning Research
Documentation hygiene and AI-agent guidelines 2026
item.description: Guidelines and architecture for documentation hygiene intended to ensure discoverability and robust operation across all AI agents.

item.title: Environment Variables vs. Clavis: Strategy and Cross-System Settings 2026
item.description: Research synthesis on when environment variables are necessary, when they are harmful, what alternatives exist, and how Vox Clavis can evolve to support cross-system user settings sync for logged-in users.

item.title: Adopting Erlang's Benefits for LLM-Native Code Generation
item.description: Research and architectural plan to bring Erlang's isolation, preemption, and let-it-crash benefits into Vox to lower K-complexity for LLMs.

item.title: FableForge to Vox Conversion Analysis
item.description: Feasibility study and architectural comparison for migrating the FableForge TypeScript/Convex stack to the Vox AI-native language.

item.title: GUI Visual Intelligence: Image Analysis Lane Architecture
item.description: Comprehensive research and design blueprint for an AI-native GUI visual testing and continuous feedback system within the Vox ecosystem.

item.title: Memory Management & Per-Actor GC for LLMs
item.description: Architectural research analyzing the cognitive-load impacts of strict borrow-checking on LLM code generation and the shift toward an Erlang-style, per-actor garbage collection model to reduce K-Complexity.

item.title: Network Neuroscience Theory and AI Agent Orchestration (Research 2026)
item.description: Research findings on applying Network Neuroscience Theory to Vox's multi-agent orchestrator architecture.

item.title: Network Neuroscience Theory Orchestration Implementation Plan (2026)
item.description: Implementation roadmap for integrating small-world topologies and affinity routing into the vox-dei orchestrator.

item.title: Version Tracking SSOT Research 2026
item.description: Research and best practices on establishing a single source of truth for versioning across Cargo crates, standard documentation, and compiler IR for the Vox 0.4 language.

item.title: Vox and Erlang: Architectural Parallels and Divergences
item.description: Research and findings comparing Vox's AI-native actor model with Erlang/OTP, highlighting specific capabilities and ideal use cases for each.

item.title: Vox as the First AI-Native Language: Reducing K-Complexity (Research 2026)
item.description: Research analyzing the landscape of LLM-native programming languages, Kolmogorov complexity, and Vox's unprecedented position as the first production-ready AI-native language.

item.title: Vox Syntax Highlighting: Universal SSOT Strategy (2026)
item.description: Research synthesis on how tree-sitter-vox, TextMate grammars, and Markdown injection queries combine to provide consistent, IDE-agnostic Vox syntax coloring everywhere code appears.

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
